chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1460 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6233/25 2.For orders on o/objection 3.For orders on CMA 5724/25 4.For orders on CMA 5725/25 5.For hearing of main case 17-09-2025 Mr. Shoukat Ali Makwal, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks quashment of the proceedings arising from FIR No.61 of 2025, registered at P.S, Bozdar Wada-Khairpur under section 9(c) of the Sindh Control of Narcotics Substance Act, 2024. It appears that the petitioner is not nominated in the FIR in question. The principle of law is well-settled that a person, who is neither an accused nor an aggrieved party in the case, cannot invoke the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court to seek relief in criminal proceedings. Even otherwise, only on the basis that nominated accused is missing, the proceedings cannot be quashed. Further, Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, D.P.G, present in Court in other matters, was asked to verify status of the above FIR, who after confirms that interim Challan has been submitted and the case is pending before the trial Court. In these circumstances, the petition is found to be misconceived, not maintainable, and is accordingly dismissed in limine along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
